title: Rich Roasted British Oats Skillet
description: A savory and adventurous British dish featuring ground oats, perfect for a flexitarian diet, with a molten and salty flavor profile, achieved through mushimono-steam cooking method.

ingredients.name: ground oats
ingredients.notes: rolled or steel-cut oats work too

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the ground oats, water, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes.
Use a steamer basket to steam the mixture for an additional 5 minutes, or until the oats are tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
If using cheese, stir it in until melted and well combined.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
